title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
